required_environment_variables.name: EDI_GITHUB_TOKEN
required_environment_variables.purpose: Read GitHub repo, ruleset, PR, and Actions evidence.

required_environment_variables.name: EDI_OBSERVABILITY_TOKEN
required_environment_variables.purpose: Read telemetry, trace, and topology evidence.

safe_usage: Do not run commands that list vault items in automated Codex sessions.
Use op run with secret references so plaintext is only available to the subprocess.
Use least-privilege service account access for scheduled connectors.
